languages.text: "Почему просто не отдать мне командование полком, раз это предрешено?"
"Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"
languages.original_text: "Почему просто не отдать мне командование полком, раз это предрешено?"

traits.locale_text: "Why not just hand me command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"
"Why not just hand me command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"
"Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"
"Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"
"Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"

languages.text: "Warum übergebt Ihr nicht einfach das Kommando über das Regiment, wie es vorhergesagt wurde?"
languages.original_text: "Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"

traits.locale_text: "Warum übergebt Ihr nicht einfach das Kommando über das Regiment, wie es vorhergesagt wurde?"

languages.text: « Pourquoi ne pas vous contenter de me céder le commandement, conformément à la prophétie ? »
languages.original_text: "Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi ne pas vous contenter de me céder le commandement, conformément à la prophétie ? »

languages.text: «¿Y por qué no cede el mando del regimiento, si dice que ha sido profetizado?».
languages.original_text: "Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Y por qué no cede el mando del regimiento, si dice que ha sido profetizado?».

languages.text: "Madem kehanette bulunulmuş, neden alayın komutasını devretmiyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"

traits.locale_text: "Madem kehanette bulunulmuş, neden alayın komutasını devretmiyorsun?"

languages.text: “既然预言都说了，为什么不直接把指挥权交给我？”
languages.original_text: "Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"

traits.locale_text: “既然预言都说了，为什么不直接把指挥权交给我？”

languages.text: 「予言されているのだから、ただ連隊の指揮を譲れば良いのではないか」
languages.original_text: "Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"

traits.locale_text: 「予言されているのだから、ただ連隊の指揮を譲れば良いのではないか」
